quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — '55% of total revenue from only 33 units', West 'roughly 65% of North's total', and 'the $761.53 gap with North'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names concrete products, regions, and figures — 'Investigate West's shortfall ($1,414.82...)' and 'Revisit Sprocket pricing... 238 units sold returned only $1,130.50'.

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like revenue concentration ('premium-priced products... generated 55% of total revenue from only 33 units') and the Sprocket volume/revenue inversion ('moved by far the most units (238) yet earned the least revenue').

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g. "55% of total revenue from only 33 units", West "roughly 65% of North's total", and "the $761.53 gap with North".

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures — e.g. "Prioritize Gadget and Doohickey... 33 units already produced $3,905.00" and "Investigate West's shortfall ($1,414.82...)".
